name: ABM & Account Intelligence
description: Know whether you're engaging the right target accounts with enough depth across the right roles — and exactly where you're at risk.
alsoSurfaces: How does our target-account engagement break down by role and signal?
Which target accounts are at risk because we've only engaged the wrong personas?
Where do the hottest signals concentrate?
Which accounts are hidden in plain sight — engaged but not yet in pipeline?
beforeWeRun: Target list scope — Tier 1 only or full named-account list?
Risk thresholds — depth, breadth, or recency?
Hidden-accounts threshold — minimum engagement, no opp open?

whatYoullGet.name: Risk matrix
whatYoullGet.desc: Accounts at risk visualized by reason (single-thread, wrong persona, no recent touch).

whatYoullGet.name: Hot signal distribution
whatYoullGet.desc: Where the strongest intent signals concentrate.

whatYoullGet.name: Hidden accounts list
whatYoullGet.desc: Engaged target accounts that have not yet become opps.

whatYoullGet.name: Sales handoff list
whatYoullGet.desc: Top 25 accounts to act on this week, with reasons.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your account intelligence dashboard in ~11 min.
